description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic (clinical decision algorithm, treatment pathway, biomarker stratification tree, CONSORT flow) from a natural-language prompt via OpenRouter / Nano-Banana, with document-type-aware quality thresholds.
rules: writes only a local PNG under record_store — but calls the OpenRouter API (network)
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY; absent the key or network the porter records the gap and writes an empty placeholder
usage: Set PROMPT (diagram description), optionally DOC_TYPE, and OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: schematic.png.
limitation: Not hermetic — needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY and outbound network to openrouter.ai. Capped at 2 refinement iterations by the core.

vars.PROMPT: CONSORT participant flow for a 60-patient HER2+ cohort
